arts.ttl: Man Utd NEED to sign Tyler Dibling: 'Most talented player I've ever seen'
arts.sum: Man Utd NEED to sign Tyler Dibling: 'Most talented player I've ever seen' Physically, the stuff I've seen him [Dibling] do at 18 in the Premier League of people just bouncing off him, being put on the floor when he dribbles the ball, he has something I've not seen in a British player in a long time.

arts.ttl: Arsenal win Gyokeres race with sensational contract offer: Chelsea and Man Utd beaten
arts.sum: FootballTransfers has previously detailed that Arsenal have put themselves to the front of the race for Athletic Club winger Nico Williams thanks to their strong financial advantage, and they are set to put this muscle to good use in order to land the Sporting CP striker. Gyokeres is set to be offered a bumper deal worth around €60 million (£50m) over five years, according to Just Arsenal .
